justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (only commented out the override marker, leaving the class extension intact). It also introduces a behavioral change in HomeController.java by replacing session.invalidate() with request.logout(), which may not be equivalent. The pom.xml updates are mostly correct but include unnecessary dependency management for jstl and switch to a milestone version of commons-email2-jakarta.
